title: Could Hummingbirds Be Getting Drunk Off Nectar? | 10 News
description: A new study has found hummingbirds might be enjoying happy hour every time they visit a flower.  Scientists from the University of California discovered floral nectar contains small amounts of alcohol produced by yeast fermenting in its sugars. title: Australians Detained In UAE Crackdown Over Iran War Videos As DFAT Steps In | 10 News
description: 10 News can reveal DFAT is providing consular assistance to two Australians in the UAE, as authorities crack down on people sharing videos of the war.  More than 100 people - including foreign nationals - have been detained so far, with one lawyer warning there is very little Australian diplomats can do to help. description: There are fresh warnings for Australians in Dubai tonight as the government issues an update for travellers and expats.  The Smart Traveller website says it has reason to believe the area around Le Meridian Hotel near the airport is under ongoing threat.
